metadata.title: Seedance 2.5 AI Video Generator | Longer Cinematic Videos with More Control
metadata.description: Explore Seedance 2.5, ByteDance's next AI video model for longer cinematic clips, richer reference control, stronger scene consistency, and production-ready creative workflows.

modelIntro.title: Why Seedance 2.5 Matters for AI Video Creation
description: Seedance 2.5 is the next step in ByteDance's AI video model family, with native 30-second generation, up to 50 multimodal reference inputs, and more practical creative workflows.

Where earlier AI video tools often stop at short standalone clips, Seedance 2.5 is built for longer scenes, stronger continuity, and richer control across products, characters, motion, and camera direction.
Use this page to follow Seedance 2.5 release updates and prepare prompts before wider access is available.

featureCards.title: Native 30-Second Scenes
featureCards.content: Create 30-second clips with more room for pacing, camera movement, and narrative progression.

featureCards.title: 50-Input Reference Control
featureCards.content: Guide the model with up to 50 multimodal references, including images, video, audio, and text.

featureCards.title: Production-Ready Iteration
featureCards.content: Move beyond one-off tests toward campaign assets, pitch clips, and story scenes that can be refined.

hero.desc: Create longer, more coherent AI videos with richer reference control, stronger scene consistency, and a workflow built for real creative production.

intro.title: From AI Clips to Usable Video Assets

content.title: Why Seedance 2.5 is different
content.text: Most AI video generators are useful for quick visual experiments. The harder problem is creating a clip that keeps characters, products, motion, lighting, and camera direction consistent long enough to become useful.

content.title: Built for creative teams
content.text: Seedance 2.5 focuses on that gap. It gives creators more room to build a scene, guide the output with references, and iterate toward a video that can support real campaign or production work.

content.title: Designed for launch workflows
content.text: Use this page to compare Seedance 2.5 with Seedance 2.0 and prepare prompts for campaign videos, product storytelling, social clips, and scene prototypes.

items.title: Native 30-Second Generation
items.desc: Create native 30-second video clips with more room for camera movement, scene rhythm, and story progression.

items.title: Up to 50 Reference Inputs
items.desc: Guide the model with up to 50 multimodal references, including character sheets, product shots, video, audio, and style direction.

items.title: Better Scene Consistency
items.desc: Maintain a more stable look across subjects, settings, camera movement, and visual details.

items.title: Creative Editing Workflow
items.desc: Refine generated results without restarting every scene from a blank prompt.

items.title: Campaign Asset Planning
items.desc: Plan social videos, ad concepts, product stories, and cinematic pitch assets in one workflow.

items.title: Seedance 2.5 Updates
items.desc: Get an email when Seedance 2.5 availability changes.

rows.label: Model focus
rows.baseline: Multimodal cinematic video generation for short, polished clips.
rows.target: Native 30-second video generation for longer, production-ready scenes.

rows.label: Reference control
rows.baseline: Supports up to 12 multimodal reference files across text, image, video, and audio.
rows.target: Supports up to 50 multimodal reference materials across images, video, audio, and text.

rows.label: Scene consistency
rows.baseline: Strong for cinematic tests and controlled short clips.
rows.target: Designed for stronger continuity across subjects, motion, lighting, and camera direction.

rows.label: Best workflow
rows.baseline: Creative tests, short social clips, and multimodal AI video experiments.
rows.target: Longer campaign videos, product storytelling, story scenes, pitch clips, and controlled iteration.

rows.label: Status
rows.target: Release updates are available on Toolaze; access details will be updated here.

steps.title: Describe the scene
steps.desc: Write the subject, action, environment, camera movement, mood, and visual style.

steps.title: Add references
steps.desc: Use images, video references, character sheets, product shots, or style boards to guide the output.

steps.title: Choose output settings
steps.desc: Set the aspect ratio, duration, quality, and style based on where the video will be used.

steps.title: Generate and refine
steps.desc: Create a coherent AI video, then adjust the creative direction before export.

comparison.title: Seedance 2.5 vs Other AI Video Generators
comparison.toolazeFeatures: 30-second native clips, up to 50 reference materials, longer-scene continuity, brand and product video workflows, campaign-ready iteration
comparison.othersFeatures: Veo emphasizes high-fidelity generation, Runway emphasizes creative tooling, Kling and Hailuo emphasize accessible video output, and many workflows still center on short standalone clips

competitorComparison.title: Seedance 2.5 vs Other AI Video Generators

rows.label: Veo
rows.baseline: High-fidelity generation, broad model awareness, and strong realism for polished AI video output.
rows.target: Seedance 2.5 is framed around longer creative scenes, reference-heavy direction, and production workflows for campaigns and story concepts.

rows.label: Runway Gen-4
rows.baseline: Creative tooling, reference workflows, and production-oriented editing for visual teams.
rows.target: Seedance 2.5 competes on controllable scene generation, richer references, and practical iteration from concept clip to usable asset.

rows.label: Kling and Hailuo
rows.baseline: Accessible AI video generation for social clips, quick concepts, and fast visual experimentation.
rows.target: Seedance 2.5 can stand out when creators need continuity, stronger scene control, and brand-ready video direction.

rows.label: Seedance 2.5
rows.baseline: ByteDance AI video model announced with native 30-second clips and up to 50 multimodal reference inputs.
rows.target: Native 30-second clips, up to 50 reference materials, longer-scene continuity, product storytelling, ad variants, pitch clips, and production workflows.

rating.title: Follow Seedance 2.5 Launch Updates
rating.text: Join the Seedance 2.5 update list to hear when access opens and product availability expands.

faq.a: Seedance 2.5 is ByteDance's next AI video model, announced with native 30-second generation and up to 50 multimodal reference inputs.
Toolaze is tracking Seedance 2.5 availability. Enter your email to receive an update when access changes.

faq.q: How is Seedance 2.5 different from Seedance 2.0?
faq.a: Seedance 2.5 moves from Seedance 2.0's 15-second, 12-reference setup toward 30-second clips and up to 50 references.
Yes. Public reports and launch coverage point to native 30-second clips as one of Seedance 2.5's major upgrades.
Seedance 2.5 is useful for creators, marketers, agencies, filmmakers, product teams, and anyone creating cinematic AI videos for campaigns, social media, or visual prototyping.

faq.q: How do I get Seedance 2.5 updates?
faq.a: Enter your email in the update form to hear when Seedance 2.5 availability changes.
